content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose(arch)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
H: low_ops ∧ short_ddl ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: modular_monolith ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ clean_seams → split(post_release)
V: ship_by("4 months") ∧ split_readiness(stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable_state)
R: ! premature_distribution
A: default=modular_monolith ∧ PostgreSQL ∧ defer(split)

[AUDIT]
default modular monolith on PostgreSQL.
6 devs ∧ 4 months ∧ part-time ops ⇒ distributed overhead not affordable.
keep domain seams clean now, split post_release when boundary pressure real.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: reject(diff)
C: public_edge ∧ no_trust("x-user-id")
H: header_override(session.userId) ⇒ impersonation
P: drop("x-user-id") → bind(userId=session.userId) → if(!session.userId) 401
V: test(spoof_header_other_user) ∧ test(missing_session→401) ∧ test(session_only→own_data)
R: ! horizontal_priv_esc ∧ ! audit_log_wrong_actor
A: revert_to_session_only

[AUDIT]
Finding: patch lets client-supplied "x-user-id" override session.userId at public edge.
Exploit: attacker sends own session + "x-user-id: victim" → acts as victim.
Mitigation: drop "x-user-id" at gateway, derive userId from session only, return 401 when session absent.
Verify: spoofed-header cross-user denial, missing-session 401, session-only happy path.
Risks: horizontal privilege escalation, audit log attribution to wrong actor.

@flint v0 hybrid

G: refactor("loadUser") ∧ preserve(semantics)
C: async ∧ await ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
C: order(missing_id → "db.findUser" → not_found → "audit.log" → "cache.set")
P: guard(missing_id) → await("db.findUser") → branch(not_found) → await("audit.log") → await("cache.set") → next()
P: wrap(try/catch) → catch(e) → "next(err)"
V: test(missing_id_401) ∧ test(db_err_next) ∧ test(not_found_404) ∧ test(success_order) ∧ test(no_double_next)
R: ! this_binding(db.findUser) ∧ ! promise_wrap(legacy_cb) ∧ ! duplicate("next(err)")
Q: does("db.findUser") return Promise ∨ need(promisify) ?
A: single async handler, single "next(err)" site, preserved order

[AUDIT]
one async loadUser. guard missing id → 401. await db.findUser, branch not_found → 404. await audit.log then cache.set. call next(). single try/catch routes all failures through next(err). verify db.findUser promise shape before drop-in; promisify if callback-only.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(heap_growth_in_billing_worker)
C: minimal_diff ∧ preserve_callback_flow ∧ no_new_deps
H: setInterval_cb closes_over batch_rows ∧ rows_never_released ⇒ heap_grows_per_tick
P: inspect(worker.tick_cb) → locate(batch_rows ∧ outer_closure_refs) → Δ(null_refs_after_flush ∨ move_batch_inside_tick_scope) → verify(heapUsed stable across N ticks with empty queue)
V: regression_test(spawn_worker ∧ run_ticks(50) ∧ assert ΔheapUsed < threshold) ∧ unit(tick_cb releases batch_rows on completion)
R: ! timer_handle_leak_if_setInterval_not_cleared_on_shutdown ∧ ! shared_cache_ref retained_outside_cb
Q: batch_rows sourced_from module_scope_array ?
A: root_cause=retained_closure_over_batch_rows ∧ min_fix=scope_batch_inside_tick ∧ null_refs_post_flush ∧ reg_test=heap_stability_empty_queue

[AUDIT]
leak likely from tick callback capturing batch_rows in outer scope. rows stay reachable every tick. fix: declare batch_rows inside tick function, null references after flush, ensure setInterval handle cleared on shutdown. regression test runs 50 empty ticks

@flint v0 hybrid

G: design(audit_log_schema)
C: retention(7_years) ∧ compliance_export ∧ partition(monthly) ∧ lean_ops ∧ store(PostgreSQL)
P: table(audit_log) → partition(range, occurred_at, monthly) → index(actor_id, resource_id, occurred_at) → detail(JSONB) → archive(detach_partition → cold_storage)
V: explain(partition_pruning) ∧ export(month_range) ∧ pg_partman(rotation)
R: ! JSONB_index_bloat ∧ ! 84_partitions_over_7_years
A: schema + partitioning + rationale

schema sketch:

```sql
CREATE TABLE audit_log (
  id            BIGSERIAL,
  occurred_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  actor_id      UUID        NOT NULL,
  actor_type    TEXT        NOT NULL,
  action        TEXT        NOT NULL,
  resource_type TEXT        NOT NULL,
  resource_id   TEXT        NOT NULL,
  request_id    UUID,
  source_ip     INET,
  outcome       TEXT        NOT NULL,
  detail        JSONB       NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  PRIMARY KEY (id, occurred_at)
) PARTITION BY RANGE (occurred_at);

CREATE INDEX ON audit_log (actor

[capsule review]

risk: x-forwarded-for untrusted at public edge ∧ client spoofs header ∧ bypass rate_limit via rotated values ∨ pin victim ip to exhaust quota
risk: no expiry on key ⇒ redis unbounded growth ∧ counter never resets
risk: no atomic window ⇒ incr without expire race on first hit

mitigation:
- derive client_ip from gateway-trusted source only (socket ip or signed forwarded header from gateway contract)
- if x-forwarded-for must be used, take leftmost only after gateway strips client-supplied duplicates
- set ttl atomically: incr then expire on value==1, or use multi/lua for incr+expire
- key namespace by route+window bucket, not raw ip alone

verify:
- spoofed x-forwarded-for from public client → rate_limit keyed on real socket ip, not header
- rotating x-forwarded-for across N values → same client still throttled
- first request sets ttl ∧ key expires at window end
- concurrent incr under race → ttl still set exactly once

main risks: trust_boundary_violation ∧ unbounded_redis_growth ∧ quota_exhaustion_dos

@flint v0 hybrid

G: extract(currency_helper) → pkg(@atlas/currency)
C: call_sites_unchanged ∧ minimal_diff ∧ backcompat(billing ∧ audit ∧ gateway)
H: three_copies ≈ drift_risk ⇒ unify(single_impl) ∧ preserve(signature ∧ locale ∧ rounding)
P: audit(call_sites) → diff(copies) → pick(canonical) → scaffold(pkg) → export(api) → replace(imports) → remove(dupes)
V: unit(locale ∧ rounding ∧ zero ∧ negative ∧ large) ∧ snapshot(existing_outputs_per_module) ∧ semver(0.1.0 → 1.0.0_after_soak)
R: ! hidden_behavior_drift_between_copies ∧ ! locale_default_mismatch ∧ ! float_rounding_delta
Q: workspace_layout(monorepo ∨ separate_repo) ? ∧ node_version_floor ?
A: extraction_plan ∧ versioning_strategy ∧ test_strategy

[AUDIT]

Extraction plan
- diff three copies in billing, audit, gateway. Record every behavioral delta: locale default, rounding mode, currency symbol placement, negative formatting, zero handling.
- pick canonical impl. Prefer billing if it has most coverage, else synthesize superset that matches all three outputs on current inputs.
- scaffold @at

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent_webhook_receiver
C: postgres ∧ provider_retries_5xx ∧ observable_replays
P: require("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(webhook_events, key, payload_hash, status) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING → if inserted: process ∧ set_status(done|failed) else: return_prior_result → on payload_hash_mismatch: "409"
V: unit(first_call_ok) ∧ unit(duplicate_key_same_hash→replay_prior) ∧ unit(duplicate_key_diff_hash→"409") ∧ unit(missing_key→400) ∧ integration(concurrent_retries→single_process)
A: dedup=unique_idx(idempotency_key)+payload_hash_guard ∧ error_model={400_missing_key, "409"_hash_conflict, 5xx_transient_retryable, 2xx_done_cached} ∧ why=single_writer_via_unique_constraint+hash_guard_detects_payload_drift+replay_serves_cached_result

[AUDIT]
dedup via unique idx on Idempotency-Key plus payload_hash guard.
first insert wins, processes, stores result.
same key same hash returns cached result, safe replay.
same key different hash returns "409", caller bug or spoof.
missing key 400. transient failure stays 5xx so provider retries.
observability: status column + processed_at + attempt_count on row.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(n_plus_1_invoices)
C: preserve(response_shape) ∧ min_diff
H: loop(db.findUser) ⇒ 3x_latency_regress
P: collect(customer_ids) → batch_fetch(db.findUsersByIds) → map_by_id → hydrate_rows
V: unit(batch_map) ∧ integration(/invoices_shape_unchanged) ∧ perf_gate(query_count<=2 ∧ p95_latency_budget)
R: ! missing_customer_null_map ∧ ! duplicate_ids ∧ ! ordering_drift
A: replace_loop_lookup_with_single_batched_fetch ∧ add_regression_test_on_query_count

[AUDIT]
cause: per-row db.findUser inside invoice loop.
fix: gather customerIds, one batch fetch, build id→user map, hydrate rows in place.
shape: unchanged, hydrate existing fields only.
gate: regression test asserts <=2 db calls per /invoices request and caps p95.
risks: nulls for deleted customers, duplicate ids in batch, row order preserved.
